name: Axis Capital Holdings Limited Depositary Shares each representing 1/100th interest in a share of a 5.50% Series E Preferred Shares
summary: Axis Capital Holdings Limited is a global insurance and reinsurance company providing a range of specialty insurance and reinsurance products. The company operates through its subsidiaries, offering services to corporations, insurance companies, and government entities. Axis Capital Holdings Limited is headquartered in Pembroke, Bermuda.
